creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Routine bug-fix update to 3.2.4

Announce message:

   "Welcome to phpMyAdmin 3.2.4, a bugfix-only version.

    Details will appear on http://phpmyadmin.net. In a hurry? you can visit
    http://sourceforge.net/projects/phpmyadmin to download.

    Marc Delisle, for the team"

Changelog:

    http://sourceforge.net/projects/phpmyadmin/files/phpMyAdmin/3.2.4/phpMyAdmin-3.2.4-notes.html/view
